creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
I have here a keymap for the Latin American Keyboards. Please include it
in the base distribution. I don't have ISO tables, but I have tested it 
on local keyboards.

Fix: 

6c6
<   001   esc    esc    nop    nop    esc    esc    nop    nop     O
---
>   001   esc    esc    esc    esc    esc    esc    esc    esc     O
8c8
<   003   '2'    '@'    nul    nul    '2'    '@'    nul    nul     O
---
>   003   '2'    '"'    nul    nul    '2'    '"'    nul    nul     O
12,18c12,18
<   007   '6'    '^'    rs     rs     '6'    '^'    rs     rs      O
<   008   '7'    '&'    nop    nop    '7'    '&'    nop    nop     O
